case_title: PETERS, BENJAMIN vs. ORTEGA, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: COURT TRIAL. HON. OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE MINUTES. COURT RULES THAT DEFT OWES $7,333.20 IN PAST-DUE RENT. RESTORATION OF PREMISES TO PLTF, STAYED UNTIL 8/23/99 UPON PAYMENT TO PLTF'S COUNSEL OF $466.62. (RENT THROUGH 8/23/99 AT $33.33 PER DAY) EXHIBITS IN EVIDENCE AND WITHDRAWN. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTEGA, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1485 - 46TH AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94122 $7,333.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,333.20, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS WERE WAIVED, NO INTEREST AND NO ATTY FEES. SHOULD DEFT FORWARD $466.62 TO PLTF NO LATER THAN 5:00 PM ON 8-9-99, THEN DEFT SHALL BE ENTITLED TO STAY OF EVICTION THROUGH AUG. 23, 1999.
